message:
refactor(error): introduce hostcall_error_code taxonomy and use Error::validation for input errors

Add Error::hostcall_error_code() method that maps every error variant to
a stable hostcall ABI taxonomy code (timeout, denied, io, invalid_request,
or internal). This replaces the previous pattern of hardcoding
"invalid_request" in dispatch_hostcall_session, ensuring that io errors
map to "io", auth errors map to "denied", and aborts map to "timeout".

Migrate validation-related error sites from Error::session/Error::extension
to Error::validation to correctly classify user input errors:
- session.rs: empty customType and missing target entry for add_label
- interactive.rs: empty customType and missing target entry for add_label
- extensions.rs: message parse failures and unknown session ops

Also update interactive.rs test expectations to use renamed model fields
(thinking_signature, thought_signature) and the ToolCall struct that
replaced ToolCallContent, reflecting upstream model changes. Remove the
/s alias for /settings from the slash command test list.

Add comprehensive unit tests for every Error constructor, Display impl,
hostcall_error_code mapping, ErrorHints generation, and From conversions
(~400 lines of new error module tests covering all 10 error variants).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
